item.quote: I'm going to test this thing out and see how well it works.
item.name: Jason Sass

item.quote: If it doesn't work, I'll be puizzled.
item.attribution: - Devin Tucker / 2.08.25 / Trail Blazers vs Lakers
item.name: Devin Tucker

item.quote: But if I does, I'll be absolutely delighted.
item.name: Dana Whitfield
